action.reasoning: Observation: Latest val peak 0.7589 (higher than prior best) but test AUC 0.7578 < overall best 0.7583 from iter17 (e=320/h=896/d=0.55); clear overfitting after ep14 despite ES at 29, ~4min budget left (~1-2 iters max at 80s each). Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT (interaction embeds + per-skill FC + masking + clip/ES/scheduler) is strong and stable (val>0.7589); current best_model.pt is not the peak test one, truncation in displayed train.py but ran OK; slight capacity/rep boost + stronger reg/lower LR can close gen gap for test AUC>0.7583. Decision: Fully rewrite all 3 files clean+complete (no truncation, full hparam ckpt save w/ all keys, no deprecated args, robust ES/clip/scheduler/jsonl-only-logging, local /tmp val predict validation, arg parsing, exact inference match); tune to e=384/h=1024/d=0.58/lr=9e-5/wd=2e-4/bs=32/epochs=50/es_pat=12/sch_pat=5 for better balance. Run train+validate then submit_eval on best_model.pt before time expires.
